description: As a BIM Coordinator preparing an interior finish schedule for the FZK-Haus residential building, enrich four distinct IfcSpace entities with the Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements property set. For two spaces, set FloorCovering to a value containing 'Timber', and for the other two, set it to a value containing 'Tile'. For all four spaces, set WallCovering to a value containing 'Paint' and CeilingCovering to a value containing 'Plasterboard'. Use properties on the IfcSpace objects rather than modeling geometric IfcCovering elements. Save the updated IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_room_finishes.ifc.
